refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump operations to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies specific operational phases impacting cycle time, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying it meets or is below CT_target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive operation scheduling algorithms for load, travel, and dump phases
DP2: Real-time cycle time monitoring and feedback control
DP3: Integrated vehicle control system optimizing operational parameters
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive operation scheduling algorithms for load, travel, and dump phases

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump scheduling parameters
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically separates scheduling concerns but requires coordination to avoid conflicting timing adjustments.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate and timely sensor data for scheduling decisions
Risk of suboptimal scheduling if environmental or site conditions vary unexpectedly
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP2) in subsequent refinement to close feedback loops.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Implements adaptive operation scheduling algorithms coordinating load, travel, and dump phases to meet cycle time targets.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data and sends cycle time performance metrics.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends optimized operation schedules to Vehicle control systems.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication with remote monitoring and control systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of scheduling logic; low diffusion as logic is centralized.
Vehicle executes commands but does not contain scheduling logic.
Minimal involvement in scheduling; mainly remote control.
No direct role in cycle time scheduling.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing scheduling algorithms in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Dependency on reliable telemetry and network link interfaces
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth; consider modularizing scheduling sub-functions if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive scheduling algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and supports cycle time optimization.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing scheduling logic in NGHE Solution reduces diffusion risk but requires robust interface management.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores indicate good alignment of DP and IM boundaries.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of scheduling logic to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for integration of real-time monitoring in next refinement level.
Ensure telemetry and network link interfaces are robust and secure.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments sufficiently address the FR with clear DP and IM mapping, and passes gate reviews with manageable risks.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; next step is to decompose sub-FRs further if required.

assumptions: Sensor data and telemetry are accurate and timely.
Network link is reliable for communication.
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype scheduling algorithms.
Telemetry reliability metrics under site conditions.
